steps.title: Use the intercept input
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs where $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function:
$$f(0)=5(0)-\frac{1}{6}$$

steps.title: Write the intercept point
steps.content:
Evaluating gives
$$f(0)=-\frac{1}{6}$$
so the intercept is $(0,-\frac{1}{6})$. The answer is A.
